image_1.decorations_added: Modern minimalist living room/hallway with a sleek console table against the main wall, large abstract canvas art above it, a statement chandelier in the ceiling tray, a large potted Fiddle Leaf Fig in the corner, and a warm-toned area rug on the tiled floor. Warm ambient lighting with contemporary decor accents.

image_2.decorations_added: Contemporary living room with a medium-sized grey sectional sofa facing the central wall, modern TV console with mounted flat-screen TV, low-profile coffee table with decorative books, LED strip lighting in ceiling tray, statement pendant chandelier, large abstract canvas art on main wall, tall Monstera plant near glass door, and a plush area rug defining the seating zone. Warm ambient lighting.

image_3.decorations_added: Modern minimalist living room with a low-profile beige sectional sofa, sleek media console on the main wall with mounted TV, LED strip lighting in ceiling tray creating warm glow, floor-to-ceiling sheer white curtains on the sliding glass door, tall Fiddle Leaf Fig plant in corner by balcony, large abstract art piece on wall, contemporary floor lamp, and a textured neutral area rug.
